title: SimpleWarps
description: A plugin that allows you to teleport to your custom warps.
body:
# SimpleWarps
#### By TomMustBe12
A clean, fast, GUI-based warp plugin for Paper/Spigot servers.  
Includes warp management commands, permissions, GUI menu, teleport particles, messages, and an automatic update checker.

---

## Features
- Create unlimited warps
- Delete warps
- Warp GUI menu
- Fully persistent storage
- No manual config editing
- Simple, clean commands

---

## Commands

- /setwarp <name>
Creates a warp at your current position.

- /delwarp <name>
Deletes the target warp.

- /warp <name>
Teleports you to the warp, or using just /warp shows a GUI of all warps.

---

## Permissions

- simplewarps.setwarp  
Allows creating a warp.
Default: op

- simplewarps.delwarp  
Allows deleting warps.
Default: op

- simplewarps.warp  
Allows using /warp and the GUI.
Default: everyone

---

## How To Use
1. Install the plugin into your `/plugins/` folder.
2. Restart the server.
3. Use `/setwarp home` to create your first warp.
4. Use `/warp home` to teleport home.
5. Use `/warp` to open the GUI of all warps.

Everything is saved automatically.

---

## Config
The plugin generates a config.yml that stores:
- Warp locations & names

You usually never need to modify it manually.

---

## Support
Need help or want more features?
Join the discord linked to this project.
